2604.26866.title: MoRFI: Monotonic Sparse Autoencoder Feature Identification
2604.26866.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) acquire most of their factual knowledge during the pre-training stage, through next token prediction. Subsequent stages of post-training often introduce new facts outwith the parametric knowledge, giving rise to hallucinations. While it has been demonstrated that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on new knowledge may exacerbate the problem, the underlying mechanisms are still poorly understood. We conduct a controlled fine-tuning experiment, focusing on closed-book QA, and find latent directions that causally contribute to hallucinations. Specifically, we fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B, Gemma 2 9B and Mistral 7B v03 on seven distinct single QA datasets, controlling for the percentage of new knowledge and number of training epochs. By measuring performance on the test set, we validate that incrementally introducing new knowledge increases hallucinations, with the effect being more pronounced with prolonged training. We leverage pre-trained sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to analyze residual stream activations across various checkpoints for each model and propose Monotonic Relationship Feature Identification (MoRFI) for capturing causally relevant latents. MoRFI filters SAE features that respond monotonically to controlled fine-tuning data mixtures of a target property. Our findings show that exposure to unknown facts disrupts the model's ability to retrieve stored knowledge along a set of directions in the residual stream. Our pipeline reliably discovers them across distinct models, recovering knowledge through single-latent interventions.
2604.26866.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在預訓練階段通過下一個標記預測獲得大部分事實知識。隨後的後訓練階段經常引入超出參數知識的新事實，導致幻覺的產生。雖然已經證明對新知識進行監督式微調（SFT）可能會加劇這個問題，但其潛在機制仍然不甚了解。我們進行了一項控制微調實驗，專注於閉卷問答，並發現潛在的方向會因果地促進幻覺的產生。具體來說，我們對 Llama 3.1 8B、Gemma 2 9B 和 Mistral 7B v03 在七個不同的單一問答數據集上進行微調，控制新知識的百分比和訓練週期的數量。通過測量測試集上的表現，我們驗證了逐步引入新知識會增加幻覺，且隨著訓練時間的延長，這一效應更加明顯。我們利用預訓練的稀疏自編碼器（SAEs）分析每個模型在各個檢查點的殘差流激活，並提出單調關係特徵識別（MoRFI）以捕捉因果相關的潛在變量。MoRFI 過濾對目標屬性的控制微調數據混合單調響應的 SAE 特徵。我們的研究結果顯示，接觸未知事實會干擾模型沿著一組方向檢索存儲知識的能力。我們的管道在不同模型中可靠地發現這些潛在變量，通過單一潛在干預恢復知識。
2604.26866.author: Dimitris Dimakopoulos et.al.
2604.26866.authors: Dimitris Dimakopoulos, Shay B. Cohen, Ioannis Konstas
